title: 2026-03-06 TACO Pressure Index Update: High at 70.43
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2026-03-06: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 70.43/100, signaling a high pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-03-06, the score printed 70.43/100 in the high regime, with volatility and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
